title: Villager rebalanced rolling
description: This datapack makes limited amount of attempts to roll the villager
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b52ba3eda32731f24e9cd9518d42d52c2f61a90.png)
## Found bug / order datapack / other - [Discord](https://discord.gg/dCWyMsE94D).

### This datapack was intended to rebalance villager rolling system.

**After a villager changed job 3 times, he became jobless.**
